projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create the first one to upload a survey.
projects.name: Project name
projects.delete_confirm: Delete project "{{name}}"? All of its active surveys will be deleted along with it. You can restore it from "Recently deleted" within the recovery window.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.empty: No surveys yet. Upload the first drone flight.
surveys.name: Name
surveys.delete_confirm: Delete survey "{{name}}"? You can restore it from "Recently deleted" within the recovery window.

upload.title: Upload survey
upload.done: Upload complete; processing continues in the background. You may close the browser.
upload.interrupted: Upload interrupted. Select the same file again to resume where it left off.
upload.pending_hint: Select the same file again under "Upload survey" and the transfer will continue from the last confirmed point.
upload.delete_confirm: Delete pending upload "{{name}}"? Progress uploaded so far will be lost.
upload.options_help: Choose which products to generate from this survey. Required products cannot be unchecked; picking one that depends on another selects it automatically.

elevation.label: Elevation
elevation.description: Terrain elevation surface (DEM); always generated and the basis for every analysis.

hillshade.label: Hillshade
hillshade.description: Terrain shading derived from the elevation, for easier visual reading of the 2D map.

point_cloud_3d.label: 3D point cloud
point_cloud_3d.description: Optimized point cloud for three-dimensional inspection in the 3D viewer.

viewer.error_3d: The 3D view could not be loaded. Retry or download the COPC file.

members.title: Project members
members.remove_confirm: Remove {{username}} from the project? They will lose all access.
